name: Neow
description: Presents 2 positive options and 1 curse option. The curse pool is built first, then excluded relics are removed from the positive pool.
selection: 2 from positive pool + 1 from curse pool

pools.name: Curse Pool
pools.description: One relic is chosen at random from this pool as the curse option.

relics.condition: Single player only

pools.name: Positive Pool
pools.description: Two relics are chosen at random. Some relics are excluded based on which curse was selected.

relics.condition: Excluded if Hefty Tablet is the curse option
Excluded if Cursed Pearl is the curse option
Multiplayer only
Excluded if Leafy Poultice is the curse option
Excluded if Precarious Shears is the curse option
Player has cards that can form bundles
50% chance (vs Small Capsule); excluded if Large Capsule is the curse option
50% chance (vs Lava Rock); excluded if Large Capsule is the curse option
50% chance (vs Pomander)
50% chance (vs Neow's Talisman)
50% chance (vs Stone Humidifier)
50% chance (vs Nutritious Oyster)

name: Tezcatara
description: Offers one relic from each of three pools, chosen at random.

name: Pael
description: Offers one relic from each of three pools. Pool 2 has conditional additions and Pael's Growth has a reduced chance.

pools.name: Pool 2
pools.description: The pool is doubled before adding Pael's Growth, giving Growth a reduced chance.

relics.condition: Deck has 3+ cards that can be enchanted with Goopy
Deck has 5+ removable cards
Always in pool but at reduced odds (pool is doubled before adding)
Player does not have an event pet (Byrdpip relic or Byrdonis Egg card)

name: Orobas
description: Offers one relic from each of three pools. Pool 1 includes a chance for Prismatic Gem or Sea Glass.

pools.name: Pool 1
pools.description: Includes either Prismatic Gem (33% chance) or Sea Glass (67% chance). Sea Glass picks from a random unlocked character other than the current one.

relics.condition: 33% chance (vs Sea Glass)
67% chance (vs Prismatic Gem); character is random unlocked non-current

pools.name: Pool 3
pools.description: Both relics require player setup. If neither is available, a locked option is shown.

relics.condition: Requires player setup (starter relic upgrade)
Requires player setup

name: Darv
description: Has a large pool of powerful relics. 50% chance to get 3 options from the pool, 50% chance to get 2 options plus Dusty Tome.
selection: 50% chance: 3 from pool OR 2 from pool + Dusty Tome

pools.name: Relic Pool
pools.description: Each set has one relic chosen at random. Sets with act conditions are only included if the condition is met.

relics.condition: Excluded with Draft, Sealed Deck, or Insanity modifiers
Act 2 only; 50% chance (vs Sozu)
Act 2 only; 50% chance (vs Ectoplasm)
Act 3 only; 50% chance (vs Velvet Choker)
Act 3 only; 50% chance (vs Philosopher's Stone)

pools.name: Dusty Tome
pools.description: 50% chance to replace one of the three options.

relics.condition: 50% chance to appear as the third option

name: Nonupeipe
description: Has a single large pool. Three relics are chosen at random.

relics.condition: Deck has 4+ cards that can be enchanted with Swift

name: Tanx
description: Has a single large pool of weapon relics. Three are chosen at random.

relics.condition: Deck has 3+ cards that can be enchanted with Instinct (Attacks costing 1+)

name: Vakuu
description: Offers one relic from each of three pools, chosen at random. No conditions.
